ops.title: Re-run .mcp.json wiring on cookie-sync, write-like-me, yasyf.com when trees free up
ops.description: Deferred from the 2026-07-17 fleet .mcp.json rollout (parent 5b82118): cookie-sync (@ holds a foreign go.sum edit; bookmarks main+consent-fix/bundle off the working-copy line), write-like-me (@ holds 5 uncommitted source/test/doc files from a concurrent session), yasyf.com (parked on site-overhaul feature bookmark). Rerun: Workflow scriptPath workflows/scripts/mcp-guides-phase2-recovery.js (session 48869672, acct-04) with args {"canonical":"f9623cef946870832ce19ec10835dd869eef10c5","only":["cookie-sync","write-like-me","yasyf.com"]} — contracts and gates embedded; preflight re-checks everything so a still-busy tree aborts harmlessly. All three still carry the semble server in .mcp.json until then.

ops.text: all three repos: .claude/fragments/.mcp.json/ layout present, lock lists .mcp.json, .mcp.json has zero semble, cc-guides check green, shipped with CI green
